zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth是Walter De Trenoweth和elizabeth的兒子，於1318年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾。他於1337年之前與Elizabeth Rushell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他在英國英格蘭可瓦爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1393年在英國可瓦爾享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth是Walter De Trenoweth和elizabeth的儿子，于1318年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾。他于1337年之前与Elizabeth Rushell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他在英国英格兰可瓦爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1393年在英国可瓦爾享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trenoweth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from one or more of at least twenty places in Cornwall named with Cornish tre ‘house, settlement’ + nowyth ‘new’, with the spellings Trenewth, Trenouth, Trenowah, Trenower, Trenoweth, Trenowth, Trenute, or Trenuth.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth was born in 1318, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom as the son of Walter De Trenoweth and elizabeth. He married Elizabeth Rushell before 1337. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. His occupation is listed as member of parliament in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1393, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth est né en 1318, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Walter De Trenoweth et elizabeth. Il a épousé Elizabeth Rushell avant 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1393, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth wurde 1318 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Walter De Trenoweth und elizabeth geboren. Er hat vor 1337 Elizabeth Rushell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als member of parliament in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1393 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth è nato il nel 1318 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Walter De Trenoweth e elizabeth. Lui sposato Elizabeth Rushell prima del 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1393, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Cornwall, England., United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.Trenoweth, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenowethは1318年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでWalter De Trenowethとelizabethの息子として生まれた。1337年以前にElizabeth Rushellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。イギリスイギリスコルンワルでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1393年にイギリスコルンワルで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth(은)는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Walter De Trenoweth(와)과 elizabeth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1337년 이전 Elizabeth Rushell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1393년 영국 코른월에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth nasceu em 1318, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Walter De Trenoweth e elizabeth. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Rushell antes 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1393, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth родился в 1318 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Walter De Trenoweth и elizabeth. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Rushell перед 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.  Он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1393 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ralph Trenoweth nació en 1318, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Walter De Trenoweth y elizabeth. Se casó con Elizabeth Rushell antes de 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1393, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
